protein_name: Ras effector protein that functions as a guanine nucleotide exchange (GEF) for RAB5B and RAB31, by exchanging bound GDP for free GTP. Required for normal RAB31 function. Belongs to the RIN (Ras interaction/interference) family. Widely expressed. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: axon; cytoplasm; cytoplasmic vesicle; cytosol; dendrite; early endosome; endocytic vesicle; neuronal cell body; vesicle
raw_fields.Molecular Function: GTPase activator activity; guanyl-nucleotide exchange factor activity; protein binding; small GTPase binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: endocytosis; negative regulation of mast cell chemotaxis; negative regulation of receptor internalization; regulation of vesicle size; signal transduction; vesicle-mediated transport
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: DKFZp762H1613; FLJ11700; FLJ22439; RAB5 interacting protein 3; Ras and Rab interactor 3; Ras interaction/interference protein 3; RIN3
